title: Terrodaak
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Terrodaak.jpg|thumb|A Terrodaak.]]
The '''Terrodaak''' was a flying creature native to [[Kohlma]], the burial moon of [[Bogden/Legends|Bogden]]. The animal was revered as a "guardian of the dead" by the [[Bando Gora/Legends|Bando Gora]]. One also lived on the planet [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]] outside of [[Sebolto's drug cartel|Sebolto's death stick factory]].<ref name="BH">''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]''</ref>

{{Creature-stub}}
